name: CustomerManagedS3Storage
description: Contains information about a customer managed Amazon S3 bucket.

allOf.description: The ARN of the Amazon S3 object. For more information about how to find the ARN for an Amazon S3 object, see Amazon S3 resources in the Amazon Simple Storage Service User Guide.
The ARN of the Identity and Access Management role that allows IoT SiteWise to send data to Amazon S3.
